notes.index_price: Collector now uses pair param for indexPriceKlines; older sparse symbols reflect Binance response history or earlier collector state.
notes.liquidation: Rows may be zero where Binance futures liquidation endpoint is unavailable/returns HTTP 400.
notes.open_interest: Long-range chunking and empty-window skip are applied; rows reflect what Binance currently returns for each symbol.
